title: Coinbase and Paxos tap USDC, PYUSD stablecoins to pay Aon insurance premiums
message_html: Coinbase and Paxos tap USDC, PYUSD stablecoins to pay Aon insurance premiums ...
snippet: Financial services firm Aon accepted USDC and PYUSD stablecoins for Coinbase and Paxos's insurance premium payments.
